segments.text: We're very grateful that the Committee has agreed that a representative for the Students' Union can present students' suggestions about the design for the proposed new Union building.
segments.translation: 我们非常感激委员会已经同意，一名学生会的代表可以对拟建的联合大厦提出学生们的意见。

segments.text: We appreciate that some of our ideas may not be feasible in the circumstances, but we do feel that it is important that the ultimate beneficiaries of the facilities should have some say in its design.
segments.translation: 在这种情况下，我们认为自己的有些想法可能不具备可行性。但是我们认为建筑的最终受益人提出的建设意见是很重要的。

segments.text: If I could start by briefly explaining what steps were taken to find out student opinion and how we have arrived at conclusions.
segments.translation: 如果我能先简单解释一下我们是如何听取学生意见及如何得出结论的。

segments.text: Firstly, a meeting was held in the current Union for our SU Committee to explain the options.
segments.translation: 首先，开了一个会议为学生委员会解释这个想法。

segments.text: Then we invited all students to submit written suggestions for the design, placing cards in a suggestion box.
segments.translation: 之后我们邀请所有学生就设计问题填写书面意见，在建议箱里放卡片。

segments.text: These suggestions then provided the basis for the design of a (Q31&32)questionnaire, which was completed by (Q31&32)approximately two thousand of the College students over a period of three weeks.
segments.translation: 这些建议为问卷的设计提供了依据，3周内有大约2000名大学生提交了意见。

segments.text: Finally, the SU Committee collated the results and drew up a report.
segments.translation: 最后，学生委员会收集结果并起草报告。

segments.text: If I can just hand around a copy of that report.
segments.translation: 如果我可以分发一下这个报道。

segments.text: This presentation is essentially a summary and discussion of the key points of this report.
segments.translation: 这次讲座主要是对这份报道的关键点进行概括、讨论。

segments.text: So , in broad terms , the consensus was as follows.
segments.translation: 所以大体上，意见如下。

segments.text: Firstly , regarding the crucial matter of the site , we presented the three options that you have proposed.
segments.translation: 首先，考虑到位置的重要性，我们提出了三条你们的观点。

segments.text: One: in the city centre , near the Faculty of Education; two: on the outskirts of the city , near the park , and three: out of town , near the halls of residence.
segments.translation: 第一：在市中心，临近教育学院。第二：在城市郊区，临近公园；第三：在城外，临近宿舍。

segments.text: We asked students to cite reasons for and against these sites and , and there was remarkable agreement on all three.
segments.translation: 我们让学生对这些地点写出支持与否的原因，结果三点出奇的一致。

segments.text: Site One was unpopular because of traffic and parking problems.
segments.translation: 第一处由于交通和停车问题而不受欢迎。

segments.text: Site Two had a number of supporters , mainly because it was close to most lecture rooms.
segments.translation: 第二处有许多支持者，主要是因为临近多数教室。

segments.text: And Site Three , out of town , near the halls of residence was clearly the most popular because of access from living quarters.
segments.translation: 第三处在城外，显然是因为接近住宿区而最受欢迎。

segments.text: It was clear that the Union was mainly to be used after lectures.
segments.translation: 很显然大厦的用途主要是在放学后使用。

segments.text: It was also felt that the larger site would allow more room for a choice of facilities.
segments.translation: 更大的场地可以容纳更多的房间放置更多的设备。

segments.text: Our second area of interest was obviously the facilities: there was minimal interest in having a library on the premises, but one option seemed to be a reading room instead - more useful.
segments.translation: 我们第二关心的显然是设施。人们对楼内建设图书馆的兴趣最低。但是有一种观点认为读书室更有用。

segments.text: We would like the current table games room to be replaced with a small gym.
segments.translation: 如果可能的话，我们希望目前的桌面游戏室换为小型体育馆，

segments.text: And, if possible a small swimming pool - not, of course, Olympic-sized!
segments.translation: 当然小型的游泳池不必像奥林匹克的尺寸一样大。

segments.text: There was a large number of respondents in favour of a travel agent’s and insurance centre.
segments.translation: 大量的受访者希望有一个旅行中介和保险中心。

segments.text: We also request that there be the offices of the Student Counselling Centre, moving this from the Refectory.
segments.translation: 我们还要求应该有一个学生咨询中心办公室，从餐厅移过来。

segments.text: There was, however, much disagreement about whether to build a drama theatre.
segments.translation: 关于是否建剧院有很多的分歧。

segments.text: Just over forty per cent of the respondents were in favour, but a largish minority were strongly against it, claiming that it is elitist and a waste of funds.
segments.translation: 超过40%的人同意，但是稍大的少部分人强烈反对，他们认为这是高级建筑且浪费资金。

segments.text: Essentially the Jury is out on that.
segments.translation: 基本上评审委员会不会采纳该意见。

segments.text: Finally, given the number of unfortunate incidents in the current Union over the past few months, a strong point was repeatedly made about security.
segments.translation: 最后，在过去的几个月里，考虑到大量的不幸事件发生在当前的大楼里，安全问题成了不断重复强调的重点。

segments.text: The recommendations would be at least video surveillance and security personnel who would check Student Union Cards on request.
segments.translation: 建议是至少设置视频监控并且让安保人员按要求检查学生卡。

segments.text: We doubt if it would be feasible to have a check at reception of all people coming in.
segments.translation: 我们怀疑检查所有进出人员的可行性。

segments.text: Well, this is the summary of the views of the student population.
segments.translation: 这就是关于学生建议的概括。

segments.text: As I say, fuller details are given in our report but I'm happy to take any questions if you have them .. (fade out).
segments.translation: 正如我所说，更多的详情将在报告中指出，如果你们还有问题，我很乐意回答……（淡出）
